meaning: <马来语>n.(源出马来西亚、印度尼西亚的) 咖喱饭调味品
examples: That dinner was lovely, a standard plate of rice, meat and spicy homemade sambal, but did not compare to that first night I ate at the market, after parking my bike among dozens of scooters.
They vary from day to day, but you're sure to find chicken or beef rendang, sambal squid, fried and boiled eggs, beef lung, spicy beef and potato croquettes.
I've gone through so much sambal sauce, and I tell you, one thing that I think discourages people from trying vegetarian eating is we think that the food is going to be bland.
